name: pdf-add-bookmarks
description: Add hierarchical bookmarks/outline to PDF files. Auto-detects text-based vs scanned PDFs, uses OCR for scanned ones. Supports Chinese and English heading patterns.
author: StarryCode-Lang

commands.name: pdf-add-bookmarks
commands.description: Add hierarchical bookmarks to a PDF file

skills.name: pdf-add-bookmarks
skills.description: Add hierarchical bookmarks/outline (章->节->小节) to PDF files. Auto-detects text-based vs scanned PDFs, uses OCR for scanned ones. Supports both Chinese and English heading patterns.
